General.Name: Cirrus Aircraft Ltd
General.Description: Cirrus Aircraft Limited, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells piston aircraft and single-engine turbine jets worldwide. The company also offers aviation parts, extended warranty contracts, maintenance operation services, and training services. It serves retail and institutional operators. The company was founded in 1984 and is headquartered in Duluth, Minnesota. Cirrus Aircraft Limited operates as a subsidiary of CAIGA (Hong Kong) Limited.
General.Address: 4515 Taylor Circle, Duluth, MN, United States, 55811
